effect.interpretation: no statistically clear deviation from comparable days (a null result is a real finding; only deviations of about 1027 MW or more were detectable at 80% power, so this rules out a large effect, not any effect)

all.interpretation: no statistically clear deviation from comparable days (a null result is a real finding; only deviations of about 1027 MW or more were detectable at 80% power, so this rules out a large effect, not any effect)

prime.interpretation: no statistically clear deviation from comparable days (a null result is a real finding; only deviations of about 1240 MW or more were detectable at 80% power, so this rules out a large effect, not any effect)

overnight.interpretation: demand ran 883 MW above the forecast beyond comparable days (t=2.3); do not read anything into this before checking the permutation test (wc_permutation.py)

all.note: within-day contrast (match hours minus same-day non-match hours), match day vs weather-matched controls; nets out day-level drift in the forecast-error series

prime.note: within-day contrast (match hours minus same-day non-match hours), match day vs weather-matched controls; nets out day-level drift in the forecast-error series

overnight.note: within-day contrast (match hours minus same-day non-match hours), match day vs weather-matched controls; nets out day-level drift in the forecast-error series
